# ToolUiMeta.Visibility property

OPTIONAL. The audiences the tool is exposed to; elements are drawn from [`UiVisibility`](../UiVisibility.md). When omitted the value is treated as `["model", "app"]` (§26.3).

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<UiVisibility>? Visibility { get; set; }
```
